case_title: FOSTER, WARREN VS WALLACE, CLEO L. C/O SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUT.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY FOSTER, WARREN AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, CLEO L. C/O SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, CLEO L. C/O SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOSTER, WARREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLACE, CLEO L. C/O SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUT. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, CLEO L. C/O SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $556.65 AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, CLEO L. C/O SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUT.
